items.title: Metagenomic Sequencing: The Diagnostic Leap Malaysia Must Take To Combat Superbugs And The Next Pandemic — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Prof Azizi Haji Omar & Dr Nur Abdul Karim
items.summary: It is time for Malaysia's health care sector to look to the UK and adopt metagenomic sequencing as a national standard. The post Metagenomic Sequencing: The Diagnostic Leap Malaysia Must Take To Combat Superbugs And The Next Pandemic — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Prof Azizi Haji Omar & Dr Nur Abdul Karim appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia, WOAH Strengthen Cooperation On Animal Health
items.summary: Malaysia and WOAH pledged closer cooperation on One Health, including stronger coordination among veterinary, fisheries, wildlife, and environmental agencies. Discussions also covered rabies eradication, zoonotic threats, and veterinary service improvements. The post Malaysia, WOAH Strengthen Cooperation On Animal Health appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Eat Less Chicken During Global Crises: UPM Experts
items.summary: UPM experts say Malaysians may need to reduce chicken consumption during global supply shocks, warning that the country's heavy dependence of at least 90% on imported grain corn for animal feed leaves poultry production vulnerable to disruptions abroad. The post Eat Less Chicken During Global Crises: UPM Experts appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MOH Spending Cuts: Gopeng MP Only Backs Cutting Festive Celebrations, Overseas Travel
items.summary: Gopeng MP Tan Kar Hing says the only MOH spending cuts he supports are cancellations of festive celebrations and overseas trips, opposing the other eight austerity measures in the MOH. "Health care is a fundamental human right and a basic public service." The post MOH Spending Cuts: Gopeng MP Only Backs Cutting Festive Celebrations, Overseas Travel appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: A Question For Malaysia’s Children’s Rights Reform: Rare Diseases, Forgotten Children, And The Right To Research — Teguh Haryo Sasongko
items.summary: We must ensure that children are not forgotten by the systems that generate knowledge, innovation, and evidence. The post A Question For Malaysia’s Children’s Rights Reform: Rare Diseases, Forgotten Children, And The Right To Research — Teguh Haryo Sasongko appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MP Slams Health Spending Cuts, Wants Parliament Tabling
items.summary: Kuala Langat MP Dr Ahmad Yunus Hairi demands that health spending cuts be tabled in Parliament, criticising four cost-cutting measures in MOH specifically: hiring freeze, as well as tighter controls on overtime allowance claims, drug usage, and lab tests. The post MP Slams Health Spending Cuts, Wants Parliament Tabling appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Austerity We’re Asked To Practise, But Rarely See — Medical Officer
items.summary: An MOH programme in Melaka with senior leadership was held in a premium hotel. While the stated objectives may have been noble, this is particularly difficult to reconcile when staff at the operational level are repeatedly instructed to practise austerity. The post Austerity We’re Asked To Practise, But Rarely See — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: LCNM Hosts First Malaysian Lung Cancer Policy Roundtable Forum
items.summary: A wide range of critical issues were discussed, including the rising lung cancer burden in Malaysia, optimal modality and frequency of screening, biomarker testing, compliance with local CPG guidelines, access to cutting-edge therapies, and various strategies to surmount real-world challenges. The post LCNM Hosts First Malaysian Lung Cancer Policy Roundtable Forum appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: JPA Admits Concerns About New Subspecialty Training Requirement
items.summary: JPA says it's aware of concerns about a new requirement for doctors to have 3 full LNPT years before applying for subspecialty training. The issue was recently discussed by the KSN, KPPA, and MOH. JPA has requested further input from MOH on implementation. The post JPA Admits Concerns About New Subspecialty Training Requirement appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Freezing Health Worker Hiring Worsens Manpower Crisis, Say Hartal, MPs
items.summary: Hartal Doktor Kontrak says freezing new positions or hiring of health workers may worsen a critical manpower crisis. MPs for Petaling Jaya and Kapar slam the spending cuts, particularly a hiring freeze. Bersama's Nik Nazmi wants targeted RON95 subsidies. The post Freezing Health Worker Hiring Worsens Manpower Crisis, Say Hartal, MPs appeared first on CodeBlue .
